---
title: "Leaves (%) Across Years"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

This page summarizes the **Leaves** phenophase intensity (interpreted as “% leaves”) across years.

- **Points:** raw observations (very transparent)
- **Red curves:** a double-logistic fit per species-year, appended into one continuous time series

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(scales)
library(phenolocrop)
```

```{r load-and-filter}
library(targets)
tar_load(d)

# d_all is now loaded from targets

ds_leaves <- d %>%
	filter(
		kingdom == "Plantae",
		phenophase_description == "Leaves",
		!is.na(intensity),
		between(intensity, 0, 100),
		!is.na(observation_doy),
		!is.na(observation_year)
	) %>%
	mutate(
		observation_year = as.integer(observation_year),
		observation_doy = as.integer(observation_doy),
		common_name = as.factor(common_name)
	)

stopifnot(requireNamespace("phenolocrop", quietly = TRUE))


fit_doublelogis_species_year <- function(df, year) {
	empty_out <- tibble(
		observation_doy = integer(),
		intensity_fitted = double(),
		observation_date = as.Date(character())
	)

	df_xy <- df %>%
		group_by(observation_doy) %>%
		summarize(y = mean(intensity, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
		filter(is.finite(y))

	if (nrow(df_xy) < 12) {
		return(empty_out)
	}

	fit <- tryCatch(
		{
			phenolocrop::doubleLogis(
				dat = df_xy,
				x = "observation_doy",
				y = "y",
				returnModels = TRUE
			)
		},
		error = function(e) NULL
	)

	if (is.null(fit) || is.null(fit$model)) {
		return(empty_out)
	}

	x_grid <- tibble(observation_doy = seq.int(1L, 366L, 1L))
	yhat <- as.numeric(tryCatch(predict(fit$model, newdata = x_grid), error = function(e) rep(NA_real_, nrow(x_grid))))

	tibble(
		observation_doy = x_grid$observation_doy,
		intensity_fitted = yhat
	) %>%
		filter(is.finite(intensity_fitted)) %>%
		mutate(
			observation_date = as.Date(sprintf("%d-01-01", year)) + (observation_doy - 1L)
		)
}

ds_fits <- ds_leaves %>%
	group_by(common_name, observation_year) %>%
	group_modify(~fit_doublelogis_species_year(.x, year = .y$observation_year)) %>%
	ungroup()
```

## % Leaves by species (all years)

```{r leaves-plot, fig.height=12, fig.width=12}
ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    data = ds_leaves,
    aes(x = observation_date, y = intensity),
    color = alpha("black", 0.03),
    size = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_line(
    data = ds_fits,
    aes(
      x = observation_date,
      y = intensity_fitted,
      group = interaction(common_name, observation_year)
    ),
    color = "red3",
    alpha = 0.9,
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~common_name, ncol = 1) +
  scale_x_date("Date", date_breaks = "1 year", date_labels = "%Y") +
  scale_y_continuous("% Leaves", limits = c(0, 100)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust = 1)
  )
```
